name: Coorg
shortDescription: A stunning adventure located in the heart of Karnataka, offering breathtaking views and cultural heritage.
fullDescription: Coorg is one of the most prominent tourist attractions in Karnataka. Attracting thousands of visitors every year, it offers a deep dive into the rich history and vibrant culture of the region. Visitors can enjoy a serene atmosphere combined with excellent local cuisine and hospitality.
history: The history of Coorg dates back several centuries. Originally built as a stronghold, it evolved over time to become a cultural center. Numerous historical texts mention it as a pivotal location during the colonial era.
whyFamous: Famous for its incredible architecture, historical significance, and the unparalleled beauty of its natural surroundings.
